_comment: Mission-console-only hooks, attached at launch via `claude --settings`. Loaded ADDITIVELY (it merges with normal user/project settings, it does not replace them). Wired by console-session.sh (ops) and console-session-wt.sh -> claude-miss (dev), so it never affects the operator's own Claude sessions. The command references $MISSION_DOC_REMINDER (absolute path to scripts/mission-doc-reminder.py), exported by those launch scripts, so it resolves whether running from the primary checkout or a dev worktree.
